description: Letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Handwriting of Avraham Maimonides. Addressed to al-Kohen al-Peqid(?). Giving instructions concerning a visit(?) of Eliyyahu the Judge. Needs further examination.
tags: Avraham Maimonides autograph, unedited Judge Eliyyahu, Avraham Maimonides
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
